name: WGL Holdings, Inc.
description: WGL Holdings, Inc. is a public utility holding company that serves over one million customers across the District of Columbia, Maryland, and Virginia. As a subsidiary of AltaGas, the company provides a range of energy services, including the delivery of natural gas, electricity, and sustainable energy solutions. Through its primary subsidiary, Washington Gas Light Company, it focuses on providing reliable energy infrastructure, carbon neutrality initiatives, and energy-related products to residential, commercial, and industrial customers, playing a critical role in the energy landscape of the Washington, D.C. metropolitan region.
